hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]&|;])git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qiE 'co-authored-by:.*(claude|anthropic\.com)' && printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"This commit message contains a forbidden Co-Authored-By trailer. This repository forbids Co-Authored-By trailers for Claude or anthropic.com identities (see AGENTS.md). Remove the trailer line from the commit message and retry."}}' || true
